name: JoAi: Set Billing Address

description.en: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).
description.es: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).
description.fr: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).
description.ro: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).
description.it: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).

bot: Use this after creating a user to set their billing address before generating an upgrade link. The userId comes from the user-create warp output. Include vatId for business accounts.

inputs.name: User ID

description.en: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.es: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.fr: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.ro: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.it: The id of the user (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The user's id returned by the user-create warp.

description.en: Last name or legal entity suffix
description.es: Last name or legal entity suffix
description.fr: Last name or legal entity suffix
description.ro: Last name or legal entity suffix
description.it: Last name or legal entity suffix

inputs.name: Country
inputs.bot: Convert the country to the two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. Austria → AT, Germany → DE) before submitting.

inputs.name: VAT ID

description.en: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)
description.es: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)
description.fr: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)
description.ro: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)
description.it: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)

inputs.bot: Optional. Providing a VAT ID marks the account as a business and routes payment through Stripe.
